## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] TypeScript builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Prototype builds successfully (`npm run prototype:build`)
- [ ] Changes are documented in code comments where appropriate
- [ ] Updated README.md if introducing new patterns or capabilities
- [ ] Related ADRs or architecture docs have been updated if applicable
